name: revit_create_beam_system
description: Creates a beam system from a closed profile polygon, layout rule, and beam type.

profile_points.description: Ordered vertices of the closed beam-system boundary

beam_type_id.description: FamilySymbol id for beam system members

view_id.description: View providing sketch plane (defaults to active view)

notes: Use BeamSystemBuilder with programmatic BeamSystemData; active view sketch plane required.
